_comment: Quick command chip palette for the sdui_terminal widget (Type ID 18). Each entry maps a visible chip label to a pre-validated whitelisted command. The Governor reads this file and injects it into the terminal SDUI node's content[HbpContent.DATA] array at screen assembly time.

commands.label: 🌡 Temp
commands._comment: Reads RPi 5 die temperature in millidegrees from /sys/class/thermal.

commands.label: ⚡ Throttle
commands._comment: Returns 0x0 if nominal. Non-zero bits indicate undervoltage or thermal throttle events.

commands.label: ⏱ Uptime
commands._comment: Returns system uptime and 1/5/15 minute load averages.

commands.label: 🧠 RAM
commands._comment: Reports total/used/free RAM and swap in megabytes.

commands.label: 💾 Disk
commands._comment: Reports NVMe partition usage in human-readable format.

commands.label: 🔗 VPN Status
commands._comment: Lists all Tailscale mesh peers and their connection states.

commands.label: 📡 Ping Node
commands._comment: Populates the input field for the user to append a node name. Mode=populate never auto-executes — requires confirmation.

commands.label: 📜 Log
commands._comment: Cap at 10 commits to prevent terminal overflow.

commands.label: 🦀 Cargo Check
commands._comment: Runs cargo check on the shua_governor workspace. Slow — expect 5-20s on Pi 5.

commands.label: 📦 TS Check
commands._comment: Runs TypeScript type check for shua_diary.
